name: Hirwa Van Garden
state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
description: A beautifully maintained man-made forest garden featuring cascading waterfalls, colorful flowerbeds, stone walls, and winding pathways perfect for family picnics.
history: The name translates to 'Green Forest'. It was developed as a recreational space for locals and tourists, showcasing local flora in a structured yet natural-feeling environment.
famousFor: Artificial waterfalls, manicured lawns, and picnic spots.
